user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to upload multiple resume files at once, so that I can quickly attach candidate documents to a requisition
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Bulk Resume Upload screen; When I click Upload file(s) and select multiple resumes; Then the files are queued with name, path, size and progress shown

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to upload an entire folder of resumes, so that I can bulk import candidates without selecting files individually
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Bulk Resume Upload screen; When I click Upload folder and choose a folder; Then all contained resume files are added to the upload queue

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to submit the queued resume uploads, so that they are processed and linked to the selected requisition
acceptance_criteria: Given resumes are queued for a requisition; When I click Submit; Then the uploads are processed and the progress and status columns update

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view the list of requisitions with their request id, department, work location, position, vacancies, closing date and status, so that I upload resumes against the correct open requisition
acceptance_criteria: Given I open the Bulk Resume Upload screen; When the list loads; Then each row shows request id, created by, department, work location, employee class, position, number of vacancies, closing date and status

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to monitor upload progress and cancel or close the upload dialog, so that I can control the bulk upload process
acceptance_criteria: Given I have started uploading resumes; When I view the Task, Name, Path, Size and Progress columns; Then I can track each file and click Close to dismiss the dialog

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh and page through the requisition list, so that I always work with current data across many requisitions
acceptance_criteria: Given the requisition list spans multiple pages; When I click Refresh or a page number; Then the list reloads and shows the requested page of records
